sections.heading: Empirical Rule Calculator (68-95-99.7 Rule)
sections.content: Calculate data ranges using the 68-95-99.7 rule for normal distributions. Find percentages within 1, 2, or 3 standard deviations from the mean.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Empirical Rule Calculator (68-95-99.7 Rule) do?
faq.answer: Calculate data ranges using the 68-95-99.7 rule for normal distributions. Find percentages within 1, 2, or 3 standard deviations from the mean.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
